## Summary

- 

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Connector/runtime compatibility
- [ ] Documentation/example
- [ ] Refactor/maintenance
- [ ] Release/tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `python scripts/check_release.py`
- [ ] Databricks/harness validation, if runtime behavior changed

## Documentation

- [ ] README/docs updated, if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] YAML/Python examples updated, if relevant
- [ ] Changelog updated, if release-facing

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, SAS URLs, or private workspace details committed
- [ ] Secrets are redacted in logs/metadata/lineage where applicable
- [ ] New behavior is general-purpose, not a one-off workaround
- [ ] Backward-incompatible changes are explicit and documented
